calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Trust'S Title To Real Property
Off Calendar May-04-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alan Yee appeared by zoom for Esselene Stancil (petitioner).

Mr. Yee stated that no written objections were filed. The Petition for Order Determining Trust's Title to Real Property is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition For Order Determining Trust'S Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Continued To May-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Deon Stancil (daughter) appearing in person.

Ms. Stancil objected to the petition. The Petition for order determining trust's title to real property. Is continued to May 01, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Stancil is to file and serve written objections on or before April 10, 2023. A response is to be filed on or before April 17, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.
